text: قَالُوا فَمَا جَزَاؤُهُ‌ إِنْ‌ کُنْتُمْ‌ کَاذِبِينَ‌

en.ahmedali: "What should be the punishment," they were asked, "in case you are liars?"
en.ahmedraza: They said, “And what shall be the punishment for it, if you are liars?”
en.arberry: They said, 'And what shall be its recompense if you are liars?'
en.daryabadi: They said: what shall be the meed of him, if ye are found liars!
en.hilali: They [Yusuf's (Joseph) men] said: "What then shall be the penalty of him, if you are (proved to be) liars."
en.itani: They said, “What shall be his punishment, if you are lying?”
en.maududi: The officials said: "If you are lying, what will be the penalty for him who has stolen?"
en.mubarakpuri: They said: "What then shall be the penalty of him, if you are (proved to be) liars."
en.pickthall: They said: And what shall be the penalty for it, if ye prove liars?
en.qarai: They said, ‘What shall be its requital if you [prove to] be lying?’
en.qaribullah: They said: 'What shall be the recompense, if you prove to be lying'
en.sahih: The accusers said, "Then what would be its recompense if you should be liars?"
en.sarwar: The Egyptians said, "What do you suggest should be the punishment for the thief, if it is proved that you are lying?"
en.shakir: They said: But what shall be the requital of this, if you are liars?
en.transliteration: Qaloo fama jazaohu in kuntum kathibeena
en.wahiduddin: The Egyptians asked them, "And if we find that you are lying, what penalty shall we mete out to you?"
en.yusufali: (The Egyptians) said: "What then shall be the penalty of this, if ye are (proved) to have lied?"
fa.ansarian: گماشتگان گفتند: اگر شما دروغگو باشید [و سارق در میان شما یافت شود] کیفرش چیست؟
fa.ayati: گفتند: اگر دروغ گفته باشيد جزاى دزد چيست؟
fa.bahrampour: گفتند: پس اگر دروغ گفته باشيد كيفر دزد چيست
fa.fooladvand: گفتند: «پس، اگر دروغ بگوييد، كيفرش چيست؟»
fa.ghomshei: غلامان گفتند: اگر کشف شد که دروغ می‌گویید کیفر آن چیست؟
fa.khorramdel: (اطرافیان یوسف) گفتند: اگر شما دروغ بگوئید، سزای آن (کسی که دزدی کرده باشد در عرف شما) چیست؟ [[«جَزَآؤُهُ»: سزای آن کسی که دزدی کرده باشد. جزای دزدیدن پیمانه.]]
fa.khorramshahi: گفتند جزای آن [سرقت‌] اگر شما دروغگو باشید، چه باشد؟
fa.makarem: آنها گفتند: «اگر دروغگو باشید، کیفرش چیست؟»
fa.moezzi: گفتند پس چیست کیفر او اگر باشید دروغگویان‌
fa.mojtabavi: گفتند: سزاى آن كار- يا آن كس- چيست، اگر دروغگو باشيد؟
fa.sadeqi: گفتند: «پس، اگر دروغگو بوده‌اید کیفرش چیست‌؟»
